name: Venn Diagram — Translational Research Overlap
input: Create a Venn diagram showing the overlap between three research domains in translational medicine: Basic Science (molecular biology, genomics), Clinical Research (patient studies, trials), and Public Health (epidemiology, policy). The intersection of all three is Translational Medicine.
qualityCriteria: Items present (Basic Science, Clinical Research, Public Health)
Description for each item is present
No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: Three overlapping circles, each labeled with domain name and key topics. Center intersection labeled 'Translational Medicine'. Semi-transparent fills.

data.title: Translational Research Domains

items.label: Basic Science
items.description: Molecular biology, genomics, biochemistry, and laboratory research

items.label: Clinical Research
items.description: Patient studies, clinical trials, therapeutic interventions

data.caption: Intersection of basic science, clinical research, and public health defines translational medicine
